name: Paygent Connect
one_liner: Paygent Connect (NMI-powered) provides a payment gateway API for processing credit card payments and managing transactions.
api_notes: The API is documented as a collection of gateway services (Payment, Three-Step, Query) accessible via security keys. It does not include Collect.js.
auth_notes: Authentication is performed via a security key generated in the merchant control panel.
access_notes: A developer can generate security keys (API keys) directly within the merchant control panel settings page.
mcp_notes: No official or community Model Context Protocol server was found for NMI/Paygent.

evidence.claim: The NMI Customer Present Cloud API facilitates payment transactions and can be used in conjunction with other gateway services like the Payment API for follow-up transactions.
Search citation: Payment Processing Integrations, APIs & SDKs | North Developer
Search citation: Worldnet Payments | Merchant API Documentation
